## Checklist

- [ ] I read `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, and the license guide
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I updated both English and Chinese docs if user-visible behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I considered tenant isolation and authorization impact
- [ ] I ran typecheck, tests, and build
- [ ] I documented any new env vars or deployment changes
